name: Cinetreak Stream Master SDI Video Switcher for Live Streaming ( 4 HDMI Inputs or 4 SDI Inputs )
description: Professional broadcast and content creators can enhance their productions with intuitive multicamera switching using the Stream Master SDI Video Switcher from CineTreak. The versatile, all-in-one live streaming switcher is equipped with four HDMI inputs, four SDI inputs, one HDMI PGM output, and one SDI AUX output.

features.Key Features: All-in-One Live Streaming Switcher | Foldable 10" HD Screen | 4 HDMI & 4 SDI Inputs | 1 HDMI PGM & 1 SDI AUX Outputs | Controls up to 4 PTZ Cameras via VISCA | Wireless IP Control | Record HD Files for Instant Playback | Downstreaming Support | Dual RTMP Streaming Destinations | Landscape & Portrait Mode
